title: AI-guided pathology analysis can help predict immunotherapy response in rare cancers
description: Researchers from The University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center demonstrated that an artificial intelligence (AI)-based analysis of tumor biopsies can predict responses to immunotherapy in a study of patients with rare cancers, published in the Journal for ImmunoTherapy of Cancer.

title: China's factory activity tops forecasts in June
description: BEIJING — China’s factory activity picked up this month, official data showed on Tuesday, driven by demand for chips, computers and other artificial intelligence (AI)-related products, which provided a much-needed boost to authorities as Beijing battles to kick-start the domestic economy.

title: South Korean tech giants to build a $518 billion chipmaking hub to serve soaring AI demand
description: SEOUL — South Korean tech giants Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix said on Monday they will invest a combined 800 trillion won ($518 billion) in building a new computer chipmaking hub in the country’s southwest region, capitalizing on surging artificial intelligence (AI)-driven demand.
